title: Paper list-item
description: A Paper plus server-computed aggregate stats. Wire shape for GET /api/v0/papers and GET /api/v0/papers/{id}?include=stats. The canonical Paper is immutable; stats are derived from claims and annotations and change as the corpus evolves. See RRP-0012.

claims.description: Total claims registered on this paper.

contested.description: Count of claims with replication_status='partial' (mixed evidence).

untested.description: Count of claims with replication_status='untested' or unset.

status.description: Paper-level rollup. 'preprint' = no annotations yet. 'untested' = annotations exist but no replications/contradictions. 'replicated' = replications without contradictions or partials. 'contested' = any mix of replications + non-replication evidence, or contradictions without replications. 'retracted' = paper has a retraction erratum.

computed_at.description: When this stats snapshot was computed. Servers SHOULD include; clients MUST treat as a hint, not a cache key.

examples.title: rrxiv: An open protocol for research preprints in the era of human-agent coproduction
examples.abstract: We propose rrxiv, a protocol for research preprints that pairs immutable papers with a structured claim graph and a Wikipedia-style annotation layer.
